message:
perf(wal): O(1) page lookup via HashMap index in WalBackendAdapter

Replace the O(n) backwards scan in read_page() with a HashMap-based
page index (page_number -> frame_index). The index is built lazily on
first read and extended incrementally as new frames are committed.

Key design decisions:
- Salts-aware invalidation detects WAL resets (new generation)
- Incremental extend avoids full rescan when only new frames arrive
- 64K entry cap prevents unbounded memory growth
- Runtime integrity check verifies frame content matches index
- Index invalidated on inner_mut() and checkpoint with WAL reset

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
